heading: Oversight
label: 1738j Oversight
text: The President may designate appropriate United States agencies to review the implementation of programs under this subchapter and the fiscal audits relating to such programs. Such oversight shall not constitute active management of an Environmental Fund.
notes: Delegation of FunctionsFor delegation of functions of President under this section, see section 1 of Ex. Ord. No. 13345, , 69 F.R. 41901, set out as a note under .July 8, 2004section 1738 of this title
